description: Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.
readme_excerpt: A curated directory of high-quality plugins for Claude Code.

description: Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful.
readme_excerpt: 🇺🇸 English | 🇨🇳 简体中文 | 🇯🇵 日本語 | 🇰🇷 한국어 | 🇩🇪 Deutsch

name: codegraph
description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
readme_excerpt: **No Node.js required** — one command grabs the right build for your OS:

name: andrej-karpathy-skills
description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
readme_excerpt: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

name: skills
description: Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#
readme_excerpt: This repository contains the .NET team's curated set of core skills and custom agents for coding agents. For information about the Agent Skills standard, see agentskills.io.

name: supertonic
description: Lightning-Fast, On-Device, Multilingual TTS — running natively via ONNX.
readme_excerpt: **Supertonic** is a lightning-fast, on-device multilingual text-to-speech system designed for local inference with minimal overhead. Powered by ONNX Runtime, it runs entirely on your device—no cloud, no API calls, no privacy concerns.

name: superpowers
description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
readme_excerpt: Superpowers is a complete software development methodology for your coding agents, built on top of a set of composable skills and some initial instructions that make sure your agent uses them.

name: agentmemory
description: #1 Persistent memory for AI coding agents based on real-world benchmarks
readme_excerpt: Your coding agent remembers everything. No more re-explaining. Built on iii engine

name: CLI-Anything
description: "CLI-Anything: Making ALL Software Agent-Native" -- CLI-Hub: https://clianything.cc/
readme_excerpt: CLI-Anything: Bridging the Gap Between AI Agents and the World's Software

name: CloakBrowser
description: Stealth Chromium that passes every bot detection test. Drop-in Playwright replacement with source-level fingerprint patches. 30/30 tests passed.
readme_excerpt: Not a patched config. Not a JS injection. A real Chromium binary with fingerprints modified at the C++ source level. Antibot systems score it as a normal browser — because it is a normal browser.

name: OpenWA
description: Free, Open Source, Self-Hosted WhatsApp API Gateway
readme_excerpt: **OpenWA** is a free, open-source WhatsApp API Gateway designed for developers who need full control over their messaging infrastructure—without vendor lock-in or hidden paywalls.

name: RuView
description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
readme_excerpt: **Turn ordinary WiFi into a spatial intelligence / sensing system.** Detect people, measure breathing and heart rate, track movement, and monitor rooms — through walls, in the dark, with no cameras or wearables. Just physics.

name: chrome-devtools-mcp
description: Chrome DevTools for coding agents
readme_excerpt: Chrome DevTools for agents (chrome-devtools-mcp) lets your coding agent (such as Antigravity, Claude, Cursor or Copilot) control and inspect a live Chrome browser. It acts as a Model-Context-Protocol (MCP) server, giving your AI coding assistant access to the full power of Chrome DevTools for reliable automation, in-depth debugging, and performance analysis. A CLI is also provided for use without MCP.

name: bun
description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one
readme_excerpt: Bun is an all-in-one toolkit for JavaScript and TypeScript apps. It ships as a single executable called bun.

name: ai-engineering-from-scratch
description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

name: 12-factor-agents
description: What are the principles we can use to build LLM-powered software that is actually good enough to put in the hands of production customers?
readme_excerpt: *In the spirit of 12 Factor Apps*. *The source for this project is public at https://github.com/humanlayer/12-factor-agents, and I welcome your feedback and contributions. Let's figure this out together!*

name: notebooklm-py
description: Unofficial Python API and agentic skill for Google NotebookLM. Full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features—including capabilities the web UI doesn't expose—via Python, CLI, and AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.
readme_excerpt: **A Comprehensive NotebookLM Skill & Unofficial Python API.** Full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features—including capabilities the web UI doesn't expose—via Python, CLI, and AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.

name: easy-vibe
description: 💻 vibe coding 2026 | Your first modern Coding course for beginners to master step by step.
readme_excerpt: Jump right in and vibe together — if you can talk, you can build apps.

name: oh-my-pi
description: ⌥  AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more
readme_excerpt: Fork of Pi by @mariozechner

name: pyrefly
description: A fast type checker and language server for Python
readme_excerpt: Pyrefly is a type checker and language server for Python, which provides lightning-fast type checking along with IDE features such as code navigation, semantic highlighting, and code completion. It is available as a command-line tool and an extension for popular IDEs and editors such as VSCode, Neovim, Zed, and more.
